docs.title: Outcomes Working Group Data Model
docs.text: The Outcomes Working Group Data Model is a LinkML schema for representing Key Event and Outcome measurements, assays, and experimental protocols in the context of environmental health sciences (EHS) outcomes research.

docs.title: Purpose
docs.text:
This data model provides a standardized way to capture and exchange data about airway biology measurements relevant to respiratory health outcomes, including:

  • Ciliary function - Beat frequency, active area, morphology
  • Airway surface liquid - ASL height, periciliary layer depth, ion composition
  • Mucociliary clearance - Transport rates, directionality, clearance efficiency
  • Oxidative stress - ROS, lipid peroxidation, antioxidant capacity
  • Ion channel function - CFTR chloride secretion, sweat chloride
  • Signaling pathways - EGFR phosphorylation, downstream kinases
  • Mucin biology - Goblet cells, MUC5AC/MUC5B expression
  • Inflammatory markers - BALF/sputum cell counts, cytokines
  • Lung function - Spirometry outcomes (FEV1, FVC)
  • Exposure biomarkers - Cotinine, metals, PAH metabolites

docs.title: Microschema Architecture
docs.text: The schema uses a microschema architecture where domain-specific measurement types inherit from a common base and can incorporate context mixins for in vitro or in vivo settings.

docs.title: Measurement Microschemas
docs.text: Microschema Container Slot Description CiliaryFunctionMeasurement ciliary_measurements Ciliary beat frequency, active area, morphology ASLMeasurement asl_measurements Airway surface liquid height, PCL depth, ions MCCMeasurement mcc_measurements Mucociliary transport and clearance OxidativeStressMeasurement oxidative_stress_measurements ROS, MDA, 4-HNE, antioxidant enzymes CFTRMeasurement cftr_measurements CFTR chloride secretion, sweat chloride EGFRMeasurement egfr_measurements EGFR/ERK/AKT phosphorylation GobletCellMucinMeasurement goblet_cell_mucin_measurements Goblet cells, MUC5AC/5B expression BALFSputumMeasurement balf_sputum_measurements Cell differentials, cytokines LungFunctionMeasurement lung_function_measurements FEV1, FVC, FeNO FoxJMeasurement foxj_measurements FoxJ1 expression, ciliogenesis

docs.title: Context Mixins
docs.text:
Each measurement can include context about the experimental setting:

Mixin Use Case Key Slots InVitroContext Cell culture experiments cell_culture_system, days_at_differentiation, donor_info InVivoContext Human/animal samples participant, sample_type, collection_site, collection_date

docs.title: Supporting Entities
docs.text: Entity Container Slot Description Protocol protocols Detailed experimental procedures Method methods General measurement techniques Assay assays Specific test definitions

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
The schema integrates with major biomedical ontologies:

Domain Ontologies Biological Processes GO (Gene Ontology) Chemicals ChEBI Phenotypes HP (Human Phenotype Ontology) Cell Types CL (Cell Ontology) Environment ENVO Units UO, UCUM, QUDT Assays OBI

docs.title: Browse the Schema
docs.text: Navigate to the Schema Overview to explore all classes, slots, and enumerations defined in the model.

docs.title: Use the Schema
docs.text:
The schema can be used to:

  1. Validate data - Ensure your data conforms to the model
  2. Generate code - Create Python dataclasses, Pydantic models, JSON Schema
  3. Transform data - Convert between JSON, YAML, RDF, and other formats

docs.title: Example Data
docs.text: All data uses the Container class as the root element. Here's a quick example:

docs.title: Ciliary Function Measurement (In Vitro)
docs.text:
ciliary_measurements:
  CILIARY:001:
    id: "CILIARY:001"
    name: "CBF measurement after ozone exposure"
    observation_type: ciliary_beat_frequency
    quantity_measured:
      value: "8.5"
      unit:
        id: "UO:0000106"
        name: "hertz"
    measurement_method: "high-speed video microscopy"
    measurement_date: "2024-01-15"
    cell_culture_system:
      id: "owg:culture-001"
      name: "Primary HBE ALI culture"
      cell_culture_growth_mode: air_liquid_interface
      substrate_type: transwell_insert
      passage_number: 2
    days_at_differentiation: 21

docs.title: Lung Function Measurement (In Vivo)
docs.text:
lung_function_measurements:
  LF:001:
    id: "LF:001"
    name: "FEV1 measurement"
    observation_type: fev1
    quantity_measured:
      value: "82.5"
      unit:
        id: "UO:0000187"
        name: "percent predicted"
    measurement_method: "Spirometry"
    participant:
      id: "PARTICIPANT:001"
      name: "Subject A"

See the Examples page for comprehensive examples covering all measurement types, cell culture configurations, protocols, and more.

docs.title: The Outcomes Working Group
docs.text: The Outcomes Working Group is part of the EHS Data Standards initiative, focused on developing standardized data models for environmental health sciences research.

docs.title: Project Goals
docs.text:
This project aims to:

  1. Standardize data representation for exposure-outcome relationships in EHS research
  2. Enable data interoperability across studies, cohorts, and institutions
  3. Support mechanistic understanding through integration with Adverse Outcome Pathways (AOPs)
  4. Bridge epidemiological and toxicological data from human studies and model systems

docs.title: Design Principles
docs.text:
The Outcomes Working Group Data Model follows these principles:

  • Ontology-first - All entities are mapped to established biomedical ontologies
  • FAIR-compliant - Supports Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, and Reusable data
  • Extensible - New entity types can be added without breaking existing data
  • Multi-scale - Captures data from molecular to population levels

docs.title: Technology Stack
docs.text:
The model is built using:

  • LinkML - Linked Data Modeling Language for schema definition
  • MkDocs with Material theme for documentation
  • Python for data validation and transformation

docs.title: Core Domains
docs.text: Domain Description Measurements Biomarkers, phenotypes, gene/protein expression Model Systems Cell cultures and in vitro exposure systems Value Set Definitions Controlled vocabularies for key entities with ontology mappings

docs.title: Contributing
docs.text:
We welcome contributions from the community. To contribute:

  1. Visit the GitHub repository
  2. Review the existing schema in src/outcomes_working_group/schema/
  3. Open an issue to discuss proposed changes
  4. Submit a pull request with your contributions

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
• Python 3.10+
  • uv for package management
  • just for running commands

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
# Install dependencies
just install

# Generate documentation
just gen-doc

# Run local documentation server
just testdoc

# Run all tests
just test

docs.title: Examples
docs.text: This page provides comprehensive examples of using the Outcomes Working Group Data Model. All examples use the Container class as the root element and demonstrate real-world use cases for environmental health research data.

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
The simplest way to get started is to pick an example that matches your measurement type and adapt it to your data. Each example shows:

  • Required fields for the measurement type
  • Proper use of ontology-backed units
  • Context for in vitro (cell culture) or in vivo (human/animal) settings

docs.title: In Vitro Measurements
docs.text: These examples demonstrate measurements performed on cell culture systems, using the InVitroContext mixin which provides the cell_culture_system slot for detailed culture system specification.

docs.title: Ciliary Function Measurement
docs.text:
Measuring ciliary beat frequency (CBF) in primary human bronchial epithelial cells cultured at air-liquid interface:

ciliary_measurements:
  - id: "CILIARY:001"
    name: "CBF measurement after ozone exposure"
    observation_type: ciliary_beat_frequency
    quantity_measured:
      value: "8.5"
      unit:
        id: "UO:0000106"
        name: "hertz"
    measurement_date: "2024-01-15"
    cell_culture_system:
      id: "owg:culture-001"
      name: "Primary HBE ALI culture"
      cell_culture_growth_mode: air_liquid_interface
      substrate_type: transwell_insert
      passage_number: 2
    days_at_differentiation: 21

Key points:

  • observation_type uses the CiliaryObservationTypeEnum (e.g., ciliary_beat_frequency, ciliary_beat_pattern, percent_motile_cilia)
  • cell_culture_system is a structured object with culture details
  • days_at_differentiation indicates maturation time at ALI

docs.title: In Vivo Measurements
docs.text: These examples demonstrate measurements from human or animal subjects, using the InVivoContext mixin which provides participant and sample information.

docs.title: Lung Function Measurement
docs.text:
Spirometry measurement from a human subject:

lung_function_measurements:
  - id: "LF:001"
    name: "FEV1 measurement"
    observation_type: fev1
    quantity_measured:
      value: "82.5"
      unit:
        id: "UO:0000187"
        name: "percent predicted"
    measurement_date: "2024-08-10"
    participant:
      id: "PARTICIPANT:002"
      name: "Subject B"

Key points:

  • participant replaces cell_culture_system for in vivo context
  • No days_at_differentiation since this is a human measurement

docs.text:

balf_sputum_measurements:

      value: "45.0"

      id: "PARTICIPANT:001"
      name: "Subject A"

docs.title: Protocols, Methods, and Assays
docs.text: The schema supports detailed documentation of experimental procedures through a three-level hierarchy: Assays (what is measured), Methods (how it's measured), and Protocols (specific procedures).

docs.title: Assay Definition
docs.text:
An assay type reference:

assays:
  - id: "ASSAY:001"
    name: "Ciliary beat frequency assay"
    description: "Assay for measuring the frequency of ciliary beating in airway epithelial cells"

docs.title: Method Definition
docs.text:
A general measurement method that implements an assay:

methods:
  - id: "METHOD:001"
    name: "High-speed video microscopy"
    description: "Video microscopy technique for measuring ciliary dynamics at frame rates above 100 Hz"
    implements_assay:
      id: "ASSAY:001"
      name: "Ciliary beat frequency assay"

docs.title: Protocol Definition
docs.text:
A detailed protocol that specifies a method:

protocols:
  - id: "PROTOCOL:001"
    name: "High-speed video microscopy for CBF"
    description: "Protocol for measuring ciliary beat frequency using high-speed video microscopy"
    specified_by_method:
      id: "METHOD:001"
      name: "High-speed video microscopy"

docs.title: Linking Measurements to Protocols and Methods
docs.text:
Measurements can reference the protocol and method used:

ciliary_measurements:
  - id: "CILIARY:001"
    name: "CBF - Control baseline"
    observation_type: ciliary_beat_frequency
    quantity_measured:
      value: "12.5"
      unit:
        id: "UO:0000106"
        name: "hertz"
    measurement_date: "2024-01-15"
    uses_method:
      id: "METHOD:001"
      name: "High-speed video microscopy"
    follows_protocol:
      id: "PROTOCOL:001"
      name: "CBF measurement by high-speed microscopy"
    cell_culture_system:
      id: "owg:culture-001"
      name: "Primary HBE ALI culture"
      cell_culture_growth_mode: air_liquid_interface
      substrate_type: transwell_insert
      passage_number: 2
    days_at_differentiation: 21

docs.title: Comprehensive AOP Example: PM2.5 Exposure → Impaired Lung Function
docs.text:
This comprehensive example demonstrates an Adverse Outcome Pathway (AOP) for particulate matter (PM2.5) exposure leading to impaired lung function. The pathway includes:

  • MIE (Molecular Initiating Event): Oxidative stress
  • KE1 (Key Event 1): EGFR activation/phosphorylation
  • KE2 (Key Event 2): Goblet cell hyperplasia and mucin hypersecretion
  • KE3 (Key Event 3): Impaired mucociliary clearance
  • AO (Adverse Outcome): Reduced lung function

Study Design:

  • In vitro: Primary human bronchial epithelial (HBE) cells at ALI
  • In vivo: Clinical cohort with spirometry
  • Exposure: PM2.5 (10 μg/cm²) vs. clean air control
  • Timepoints: 4h (early), 24h (intermediate), 7d (late)
# =============================================================================
# ASSAYS - The tests being performed
# =============================================================================

assays:
  - id: "ASSAY:001"
    name: "Reactive oxygen species assay"
    description: "Assay for measuring intracellular ROS levels using fluorescent probes"

  - id: "ASSAY:002"
    name: "Protein phosphorylation assay"
    description: "Assay for detecting phosphorylation of target proteins"

  - id: "ASSAY:003"
    name: "Gene expression assay"
    description: "Assay for measuring mRNA expression levels"

  - id: "ASSAY:004"
    name: "Ciliary beat frequency assay"
    description: "Assay for measuring the frequency of ciliary beating in airway epithelial cells"

  - id: "ASSAY:005"
    name: "Mucociliary transport assay"
    description: "Assay for measuring the rate and efficiency of mucus/particle transport"

  - id: "ASSAY:006"
    name: "Pulmonary function test"
    description: "Clinical assay for measuring lung volumes and airflow"

# =============================================================================
# METHODS - General techniques implementing the assays
# =============================================================================

methods:
  - id: "METHOD:001"
    name: "DCFDA fluorescence assay"
    description: "Measurement of intracellular ROS using 2',7'-dichlorofluorescein diacetate (DCFDA) probe with plate reader detection"
    implements_assay:
      id: "ASSAY:001"
      name: "Reactive oxygen species assay"

  - id: "METHOD:002"
    name: "Western blot"
    description: "Protein detection and semi-quantification by SDS-PAGE and immunoblotting"
    implements_assay:
      id: "ASSAY:002"
      name: "Protein phosphorylation assay"

  - id: "METHOD:003"
    name: "Quantitative RT-PCR"
    description: "Reverse transcription followed by quantitative PCR for mRNA quantification"
    implements_assay:
      id: "ASSAY:003"
      name: "Gene expression assay"

  - id: "METHOD:004"
    name: "High-speed video microscopy"
    description: "Video microscopy at frame rates >100 Hz for ciliary motion analysis"
    implements_assay:
      id: "ASSAY:004"
      name: "Ciliary beat frequency assay"

  - id: "METHOD:005"
    name: "Fluorescent microsphere tracking"
    description: "Tracking fluorescent particles to measure mucociliary transport rate"
    implements_assay:
      id: "ASSAY:005"
      name: "Mucociliary transport assay"

  - id: "METHOD:006"
    name: "Spirometry"
    description: "Standardized spirometry following ATS/ERS guidelines"
    implements_assay:
      id: "ASSAY:006"
      name: "Pulmonary function test"

# =============================================================================
# PROTOCOLS - Detailed procedures for each method
# =============================================================================

protocols:
  - id: "PROTOCOL:001"
    name: "DCFDA ROS detection in ALI cultures"
    description: "Protocol for measuring intracellular ROS in differentiated HBE cells using DCFDA"
    specified_by_method:
      id: "METHOD:001"
      name: "DCFDA fluorescence assay"

  - id: "PROTOCOL:002"
    name: "Western blot for phospho-EGFR"
    description: "Protocol for detecting EGFR phosphorylation at Y1068 by Western blot"
    specified_by_method:
      id: "METHOD:002"
      name: "Western blot"

  - id: "PROTOCOL:003"
    name: "qRT-PCR for MUC5AC"
    description: "Protocol for measuring MUC5AC mRNA expression by qRT-PCR with GAPDH normalization"
    specified_by_method:
      id: "METHOD:003"
      name: "Quantitative RT-PCR"

  - id: "PROTOCOL:004"
    name: "CBF measurement by high-speed microscopy"
    description: "Protocol for measuring ciliary beat frequency using high-speed video microscopy at 200 fps"
    specified_by_method:
      id: "METHOD:004"
      name: "High-speed video microscopy"

  - id: "PROTOCOL:005"
    name: "MCT rate by microsphere tracking"
    description: "Protocol for measuring mucociliary transport rate using 1-μm fluorescent microspheres"
    specified_by_method:
      id: "METHOD:005"
      name: "Fluorescent microsphere tracking"

  - id: "PROTOCOL:006"
    name: "Pre- and post-bronchodilator spirometry"
    description: "Clinical spirometry protocol following ATS/ERS 2019 guidelines with bronchodilator reversibility testing"
    specified_by_method:
      id: "METHOD:006"
      name: "Spirometry"

# =============================================================================
# OXIDATIVE STRESS MEASUREMENTS (MIE)
# =============================================================================

oxidative_stress_measurements:
  # Control - 4h
  - id: "OX:001"
    name: "ROS level - Control 4h"
    description: "Intracellular ROS in control HBE cells at 4 hours"
    observation_type: reactive_oxygen_species
    quantity_measured:
      value: "1.0"
      unit:
        id: "UO:0000193"
        name: "fold change"
    measurement_date: "2024-01-15"
    uses_method:
      id: "METHOD:001"
      name: "DCFDA fluorescence assay"
    follows_protocol:
      id: "PROTOCOL:001"
      name: "DCFDA ROS detection in ALI cultures"
    cell_culture_system:
      id: "owg:culture-aop-001"
      name: "Primary HBE ALI culture - Donor 1"
      cell_culture_growth_mode: air_liquid_interface
      substrate_type: transwell_insert
      passage_number: 2
      cell_type:
        id: "CL:0002328"
        name: "bronchial epithelial cell"
      anatomical_origin:
        id: "UBERON:0002031"
        name: "bronchus"
      model_species:
        id: "NCBITaxon:9606"
        name: "Homo sapiens"
    days_at_differentiation: 21
    donor_info: "Healthy non-smoker, 35y female"
    replicates_per_donor: 3

  # PM2.5 exposed - 4h
  - id: "OX:002"
    name: "ROS level - PM2.5 4h"
    description: "Intracellular ROS in PM2.5-exposed HBE cells at 4 hours"
    observation_type: reactive_oxygen_species
    quantity_measured:
      value: "2.8"
      unit:
        id: "UO:0000193"
        name: "fold change"
    measurement_date: "2024-01-15"
    uses_method:
      id: "METHOD:001"
      name: "DCFDA fluorescence assay"
    follows_protocol:
      id: "PROTOCOL:001"
      name: "DCFDA ROS detection in ALI cultures"
    cell_culture_system:
      id: "owg:culture-aop-001"
      name: "Primary HBE ALI culture - Donor 1"
      cell_culture_growth_mode: air_liquid_interface
      substrate_type: transwell_insert
      passage_number: 2
    days_at_differentiation: 21
    donor_info: "Healthy non-smoker, 35y female"
    replicates_per_donor: 3

  # Lipid peroxidation marker - PM2.5 24h
  - id: "OX:003"
    name: "MDA level - PM2.5 24h"
    description: "Malondialdehyde (lipid peroxidation marker) after PM2.5 exposure"
    observation_type: malondialdehyde
    quantity_measured:
      value: "1.9"
      unit:
        id: "UO:0000193"
        name: "fold change"
    measurement_date: "2024-01-16"
    uses_method:
      id: "METHOD:001"
      name: "DCFDA fluorescence assay"
    cell_culture_system:
      id: "owg:culture-aop-001"
      name: "Primary HBE ALI culture - Donor 1"
      cell_culture_growth_mode: air_liquid_interface
      substrate_type: transwell_insert
      passage_number: 2
    days_at_differentiation: 21

# =============================================================================
# EGFR PHOSPHORYLATION MEASUREMENTS (KE1)
# =============================================================================

egfr_phosphorylation_measurements:
  # Control - 4h
  - id: "EGFR:001"
    name: "pEGFR Y1068 - Control 4h"
    description: "EGFR phosphorylation at Y1068 in control cells at 4 hours"
    observation_type: egfr_phosphorylation
    phosphorylation_site: "Y1068"
    quantity_measured:
      value: "1.0"
      unit:
        id: "UO:0000193"
        name: "fold change"
    measurement_date: "2024-01-15"
    uses_method:
      id: "METHOD:002"
      name: "Western blot"
    follows_protocol:
      id: "PROTOCOL:002"
      name: "Western blot for phospho-EGFR"
    cell_culture_system:
      id: "owg:culture-aop-001"
      name: "Primary HBE ALI culture - Donor 1"
      cell_culture_growth_mode: air_liquid_interface
      substrate_type: transwell_insert
      passage_number: 2
    days_at_differentiation: 21

  # PM2.5 exposed - 4h
  - id: "EGFR:002"
    name: "pEGFR Y1068 - PM2.5 4h"
    description: "EGFR phosphorylation at Y1068 after PM2.5 exposure at 4 hours"
    observation_type: egfr_phosphorylation
    phosphorylation_site: "Y1068"

docs.title: Outcomes Working Group Schema
docs.text:
A LinkML data model for representing biological measurements, assays, and experimental protocols in the context of outcomes research. This is the main entry point that imports the measurement base schema and domain-specific microschemas.

URI: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group

Name: outcomes_working_group

Assay A test or experiment used to measure a specific biological or chemical activi... BALFSputumMeasurement Measurement of bronchoalveolar lavage fluid (BALF) or sputum components inclu... CFTRMeasurement Measurement of CFTR (cystic fibrosis transmembrane conductance regulator) fun... CiliaryFunctionMeasurement Measurement of ciliary function including beat frequency, active area, cilia ... docs.title: Class: ASLMeasurement
docs.text:
Measurement of airway surface liquid properties including ASL height, periciliary layer depth, and ion composition. Critical for assessing airway hydration status in CF and other mucociliary disorders.

URI: outcomes_working_group:ASLMeasurement

    click ASLMeasurement href "../ASLMeasurement/"

docs.title: Enum: ASLObservationTypeEnum
docs.text:
Observation types for airway surface liquid measurements.

URI: outcomes_working_group:ASLObservationTypeEnum

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description asl_height None Airway surface liquid height/depth (μm) periciliary_layer_depth None Periciliary layer (PCL) depth (μm) mucus_layer_thickness None Thickness of the mucus gel layer (μm) asl_chloride_concentration None Chloride ion concentration in ASL asl_sodium_concentration None Sodium ion concentration in ASL asl_potassium_concentration None Potassium ion concentration in ASL asl_ph None pH of airway surface liquid

docs.title: Class: CellularSystem
docs.text:
Cell-based model systems that use living cells to model biological processes. Includes 2D cultures, 3D systems, and co-cultures. Abstract base class for specific culture types.

  • NOTE: this is an abstract class and should not be instantiated directly

docs.title: Direct
docs.text:
name: CiliaryFunctionMeasurement
implements:
- measurement_base:Measurement
description: Measurement of ciliary function including beat frequency, active area,
  cilia morphology, and ciliated cell populations. Can be performed in vitro on ALI
  cultures or in vivo via intranasal imaging (e.g., μOCT).
from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
mixins:
- Measurement
- InVitroContext
- InVivoContext
slot_usage:
  observation_type:
    name: observation_type
    range: CiliaryFunctionObservationTypeEnum

name: CiliaryFunctionObservationTypeEnum
description: Observation types for ciliary function measurements.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group

permissible_values:
  ciliary_beat_frequency:

    description: Percentage of epithelial surface with actively beating cilia

    description: Number of cilia per cell

    description: Percentage of cells that are ciliated

    description: Pattern of ciliary motion (coordinated, dyskinetic, immotile)
  ciliary_beat_amplitude:

    description: Amplitude of ciliary beat stroke

    description: Ratios between different cell types (e.g., ciliated to goblet cell
      ratio)

docs.title: Class: EGFRPhosphorylationMeasurement
docs.text:
Measurement of EGFR (epidermal growth factor receptor) phosphorylation. Phosphorylation site (e.g., Y1068, Y1173) is critical for interpreting activation status. Western blot is the most common detection method. Phosphorylation measurement provides the most specific evidence for EGFR activation; downstream kinase data alone is insufficient without direct phosphorylation evidence or inhibitor reversal studies.

URI: outcomes_working_group:EGFRPhosphorylationMeasurement

name: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
implements:
- measurement_base:Measurement
description: Measurement of goblet cell populations and mucin production including
  goblet cell counts, mucin gene/protein expression, and mucus properties. Assesses
  goblet cell hyperplasia and mucus hypersecretion phenotypes.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
mixins:
- Measurement
- InVitroContext
- InVivoContext
slot_usage:
  observation_type:
    name: observation_type
    range: GobletCellMucinObservationTypeEnum
attributes:
  id:
    name: id
    description: A unique identifier for the entity.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    identifier: true
    alias: id
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - Measurement
    - Assay
    - Method
    - Protocol
    - Unit
    - NamedEntity
    - MediumSupplement
    - CellularSystem
    range: uriorcurie
    required: true
  name:
    name: name
    description: A human-readable name for the entity.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:name
    alias: name
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - Measurement
    - Assay
    - Method
    - Protocol
    - Unit
    - NamedEntity
    - MediumSupplement
    - CellularSystem
    range: string
  description:
    name: description
    description: A detailed description of the entity.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:description
    alias: description
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - Measurement
    - Assay
    - Method
    - Protocol
    - CellLine
    - CellularSystem
    range: string
  observation_type:
    name: observation_type
    description: The type of observation being measured. Constrained by domain-specific
      enums in microschemas (e.g., CiliaryObservationTypeEnum).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: observation_type
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - Measurement
    range: GobletCellMucinObservationTypeEnum
  quantity_measured:
    name: quantity_measured
    description: The measured quantity value with its unit.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: quantity_measured
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - Measurement
    range: QuantityValue
    inlined: true
  range_low:
    name: range_low
    description: Lower bound of the reference range for this measurement type.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: range_low
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - Measurement
    range: QuantityValue
    inlined: true
  range_high:
    name: range_high
    description: Upper bound of the reference range for this measurement type.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: range_high
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - Measurement
    range: QuantityValue
    inlined: true
  measured_entity:
    name: measured_entity
    description: The biological or chemical entity being measured (e.g., Cilium, CFTR,
      ROS). Reference to an ontology term.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: measured_entity
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - Measurement
    range: NamedEntity
    inlined: true
  measurement_date:

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: measurement_date
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - Measurement
    - GeneExpressionMeasurement
    - ProteinExpressionMeasurement
    range: date
  uses_method:
    name: uses_method
    description: The Method used to perform this measurement.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: uses_method
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - Measurement
    range: Method
    inlined: true
  follows_protocol:
    name: follows_protocol
    description: The Protocol that this Measurement follows.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group

    alias: follows_protocol
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement

    rank: 1000
    alias: days_at_differentiation
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - InVitroContext
    range: integer
  donor_info:
    name: donor_info

      age, anatomical region).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: donor_info
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - InVitroContext
    range: string
  replicates_per_donor:
    name: replicates_per_donor

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: replicates_per_donor
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - InVitroContext
    - CellCultureConditions
    range: integer
  participant:
    name: participant
    description: The study participant from whom the measurement was taken.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: participant
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - InVivoContext
    - ProteinExpressionMeasurement
    range: NamedEntity
    inlined: true
  sample_type:
    name: sample_type
    description: Type of biological sample (e.g., urine, blood, sputum, nasal epithelium,
      exhaled breath condensate).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: sample_type
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - InVivoContext
    range: SampleTypeEnum
  collection_site:
    name: collection_site
    description: Anatomical site of sample collection (e.g., inferior turbinate, bronchus).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: collection_site
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - InVivoContext
    range: string
  collection_date:
    name: collection_date
    description: Date when the sample was collected.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: collection_date
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - InVivoContext
    range: date
  subject_characteristics:
    name: subject_characteristics
    description: Relevant subject characteristics (e.g., age, sex, disease state,
      medication use, smoking status).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: subject_characteristics
    owner: GobletCellMucinMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - InVivoContext
    range: string

docs.title: Enum: GobletCellMucinObservationTypeEnum
docs.text:
Observation types for goblet cell and mucin measurements.

URI: outcomes_working_group:GobletCellMucinObservationTypeEnum

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description goblet_cell_count CL:0000160 Number or percentage of goblet cells goblet_to_ciliated_ratio None Ratio of goblet cells to ciliated cells muc5ac_expression None MUC5AC gene or protein expression muc5b_expression None MUC5B gene or protein expression muc5ac_muc5b_ratio None Ratio of MUC5AC to MUC5B expression mucin_protein_concentration None Total mucin protein concentration mucin_secretion_rate None Rate of mucin secretion mucus_viscosity None Viscosity of airway mucus percent_solids None Percent solids in mucus/secretions

docs.text: Name Description observation_type

docs.title: Class: InVitroContext
docs.text:
Context slots for in vitro measurements using cell culture systems. Mix this into microschemas that can be performed on cultured cells. The cell_culture_system slot provides a rich reference to the full CellularSystem model (TwoDCellCulture, ThreeDCellCulture, or CoCulture).

URI: outcomes_working_group:InVitroContext

 classDiagram
    class InVitroContext
    click InVitroContext href "../InVitroContext/"
      InVitroContext <|-- CiliaryFunctionMeasurement
        click CiliaryFunctionMeasurement href "../CiliaryFunctionMeasurement/"
      InVitroContext <|-- ASLMeasurement
        click ASLMeasurement href "../ASLMeasurement/"
      InVitroContext <|-- MCCMeasurement
        click MCCMeasurement href "../MCCMeasurement/"
      InVitroContext <|-- OxidativeStressMeasurement
        click OxidativeStressMeasurement href "../OxidativeStressMeasurement/"
      InVitroContext <|-- CFTRMeasurement
        click CFTRMeasurement href "../CFTRMeasurement/"
      InVitroContext <|-- EGFRPhosphorylationMeasurement
        click EGFRPhosphorylationMeasurement href "../EGFRPhosphorylationMeasurement/"
      InVitroContext <|-- GobletCellMucinMeasurement
        click GobletCellMucinMeasurement href "../GobletCellMucinMeasurement/"
      InVitroContext <|-- FoxJMeasurement
        click FoxJMeasurement href "../FoxJMeasurement/"

      InVitroContext : cell_culture_system





        InVitroContext --> "0..1" CellularSystem : cell_culture_system
        click CellularSystem href "../CellularSystem/"



      InVitroContext : days_at_differentiation

      InVitroContext : donor_info

      InVitroContext : replicates_per_donor

docs.title: Class: LungFunctionMeasurement
docs.text:
